LivingWorld.example: Ai.LivingWorld({ AIGuid = uGuid, Attrib = "LivingWorldBehaviour", State = false })

SetState.example: Ai.SetState({ AIGuid = uCarmona, State = "Vip", Value = true })

Flyby.example: Airstrike.Flyby(tTemplates[sFaction], x - 50, z + 300, x, z, y + 100, 40)

PlayRawAnimation.example: Human.PlayRawAnimation(uGuid, sAnim, false, false, -1, true, true)

AddTripwire.example: Marker.AddTripwire(x0, y0, z0, fWidth, yaw0, r, g, b)

GetXZHeading.example: Math.GetXZHeading(tX - pX, tY - pY, tZ - pZ)

SendEvent_HVTFanfare.example: Net.SendEvent_HVTFanfare(iFanfareType, sFactionId, sDesc, iInlineIcon, nCompleted, nQuota)

StartHeliWaveSpawner.example: Pg.StartHeliWaveSpawner({ tWave1, tWave2, tWave3, tWave4, tWave5, tWave6 })

SetWidgetColor.example: _GuiInternal.SetWidgetColor(self.BasicData.uId, r, g, b, a, not bSuppressPropogation)
